metaTitle: Consignment San Diego, CA | Beverage Equipment Traders

heroBody: Quietly liquidate idle assets. We handle photography, listings, vetting, and payout. Available in San Diego and nationwide.
bodyHeading: Consignment in San Diego — What to Know
locationParagraph: For San Diego area clients, consignment jobs typically turn around within 1 to 2 weeks. Our San Marcos facility is a short drive — equipment can be inspected in person before any commitment.
marketParagraph: Beverage Equipment Traders serves buyers and sellers throughout North America. The San Diego market is one of many active markets we work in — contact us regardless of your location and we will advise on scope and timeline.
sidebarBody: Our trade desk responds within one business day. Describe your project and we will return a complete scope and price for San Diego.
